name: TPI Composites, Inc.
description: TPI Composites, Inc. is a leading independent manufacturer of composite wind blades for the global wind energy market. Headquartered in Scottsdale, Arizona, the company provides high-quality, cost-effective composite solutions to major original equipment manufacturers (OEMs). Since its inception in 2001, TPI has manufactured over 100,000 wind blades, leveraging its expertise in precision molding, materials science, and manufacturing processes. With a global footprint that includes facilities across North America, Europe, and Asia, the company focuses on delivering reliable, sustainable energy solutions while maintaining a strong commitment to environmental, social, and governance (ESG) standards.
